title: Section 3
content: 1[3. Construction of certain references to Act 15 of 1877 and Act 9 of 1871.--All references in any Act or Regulation to sections 26 and 27 of the Indian Limitation Act, 18772 or to sections 27 and 28 of Act No. 9 of 18713 shall, in the territories to which this Act extends, be read as made to sections 15 and 16 of this Act.]
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 10 of 1914, s. 2 and the First Schedule, for s. 3. 2. See now the Limitation Act, 1963 (36 of 1963). 3. Rep. by Act 15 of 1877.
